entries.name: email
entries.description: Email address of the user account

entries.name: timestamp
entries.description: Timestamp when the password was changed

entries.name: secureAccountURL
entries.description: URL to secure the account if unauthorized change occurred

entries.name: appName
entries.description: Name of the application sending the email

entries.name: supportEmail
entries.description: Support email address for security concerns

entries.name: logoURL
entries.description: Logo URL(s) - a single string or light/dark variants. If omitted, no logo is shown.

entries.name: classNames
entries.description: Custom CSS class names for styling specific parts of the email

entries.name: colors
entries.description: Custom color scheme for light and dark modes

entries.name: poweredBy
entries.description: Whether to show the "Powered by better-auth" footer

entries.name: darkMode
entries.description: Whether to enable dark mode support

entries.name: head
entries.description: Additional React nodes to inject into the email head

entries.name: localization
entries.description: Localization overrides for customizing email text
entries.type: Partial<{ YOUR_PASSWORD_HAS_BEEN_CHANGED: string; LOGO: string; PASSWORD_CHANGED_SUCCESSFULLY: string; PASSWORD_FOR_YOUR_ACCOUNT_CHANGED: string; CHANGED_AT: string; IF_YOU_MADE_THIS_CHANGE: string; I_DIDNT_MAKE_THIS_CHANGE: string; EMAIL_SENT_BY: string; IF_YOU_DIDNT_AUTHORIZE_THIS_CHANGE: string; POWERED_BY_BETTER_AUTH: string; }>
